title: Debug jaboostin auth on congress page

log.context: Debug jaboostin auth on congress page

Service is back up and running with the fix.

---

**Root cause confirmed and fixed: missing `secure=True` on the `tauth_github` cookie.**

In `/mnt/data/terminal/server.py` (line 159), the `set_cookie` call for `tauth_github` was setting the cookie with `domain='.clung.us'` but without `secure=True`. Modern browsers enforce that cookies without the `Secure` attribute are not sent on HTTPS requests — even when the domain matches and the page is already over HTTPS.
